name: Daily stock check
prompt: Pull every SKU inventory level via Shopify Composio. For any SKU below safety stock (default <30 units, P1 if <10), write to ../alerts.jsonl and draft a reorder PO to Caner via Gmail.

name: Monday Sendcloud daily ops summary
prompt: Pull last 7 days from Sendcloud (when wired). Shipped count, in transit, exceptions (lost, returned, failed delivery). Output to outputs/sendcloud-weekly-{date}.md.

name: Wednesday fulfillment SLA audit
prompt: Find any orders with order_date > 48h ago and status=unfulfilled. Surface as P2 alert. Draft email to Sendcloud + 3PL contact.
